title: Bovo Yagen (planet)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Bovo Yagen}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:BovoYagen_CTD.jpg]] |name=Bovo Yagen |region=[[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |sector=[[Kailion sector/Legends|Kailion sector]] |system=[[Bovo Yagen system/Legends|Bovo Yagen system]] |coordinates=O-13 |xyz= |distance= |suns=1: [[Bovo Yagen (star)|Bovo Yagen]] |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday=28 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]]''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' |lengthyear=386 [[Local day/Legends|local days]] |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere=[[Atmosphere/Legends#Type I atmospheres|Type I]] {{C|breathable}} |climate=[[Temperature/Legends|Temperate]] |gravity=[[Gravity/Legends|Standard]] |terrain=[[Jungle/Legends|Jungle]] |water=[[Water/Legends|Moist]] |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Bovorian]]s |otherspecies=[[Human/Legends|Humans]] ([[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]]), [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]], [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]], [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]], [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], [[Drall/Legends|Drall]] |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population=1.5 million Humans, 5 million Bovorians |demonym= |cities= |imports=High technology |exports=[[Foodstuff/Legends|Foodstuffs]] |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] }} {{Quote|Right on schedule. Bovo Yagen is next. That's confirmed, too. No rumor. Estimated system population twelve million—if you want to believe estimates after today. And they're spread out over two inhabited planets and dozens of stations, asteroids and habitats. If we couldn't pull ten or fifteen thousand people out of this system, what the hell are we going to do there?"
"I don't know. I don't know."|[[Bril Parry]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] after the destruction of [[Thanta Zilbra (planet)|Thanta Zilbra]]|''[[Assault at Selonia]]''}} '''Bovo Yagen''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Route]]. It was home to the native [[Bovorian]]s who were later joined by a family of settlers led by a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] named [[Bovo Yagen]]. Initially the natives were wary of Yagen and his family due to some negative contacts with other [[Human/Legends|Humans]] in the past. After Yagen and his family proved that they had nothing but good intentions, the Bovorians welcomed them and allowed them to stay. Over the next several years, more traders and refugees from the Empire discovered the planet and settled there. After the demise of Yagen and the later demise of the Empire, the inhabitants of Bovo Yagen made themselves known to the rest of the Galaxy and prospered because of it. During the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]], the [[Bovo Yagen system/Legends|Bovo Yagen system]] was the second inhabited star system targeted for destruction by the [[Sacorrian Triad]] after the [[Thanta Zilbra system/Legends|Thanta Zilbra system]]. The twelve million inhabitants of Bovo Yagen, however, did not meet the same fate as the inhabitants of Thanta Zilbra due to the actions of a [[Anakin Solo|seven-year-old child]]. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1stm}} {{Imo}} *''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{1stID|Bovo Yagen}} ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' *''[[Alien Encounters]]'' *{{CSWECite|I||Bovo Yagen}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Agriworlds]] [[Category:Bovo Yagen system locations]] [[Category:Confederation planets]] [[Category:Jungle planets]] [[Category:New Republic planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Expansion Region]] [[Category:Planets in the Slice]]
